name: Love Strike
overview: "I became a superstar because you dumped me" Chun Si-yeon thought love would last when her boyfriend Lee Jung made it to the MLB. But his success turned into her heartbreak, as his mother forced their breakup. Eight years later, unable to forget her, Lee Jung returns to Korea as a baseball star-right to where Si-yeon now works as a rookie PR staff.

trailers.title: 10년 전에 찬 전남친이 슈퍼스타가 되어 돌아왔다 [러브 스트라이크] 1-3화 몰아보기
